name: OpenArm ROS2
postCreateCommand: rosdep update && rosdep install --from-paths /openarm_ws/src --ignore-src -r -y --skip-keys 'openarm_can openarm_description moveit_ros_move_group moveit_kinematics moveit_planners moveit_simple_controller_manager moveit_configs_utils moveit_ros_visualization moveit_setup_assistant' || true && cd /openarm_ws && colcon build --cmake-args -DCMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS=ON && cd /openarm_ws/src && ln -sf /openarm_ws/build/compile_commands.json compile_commands.json || true
